name: emw-warp-mcore
help:
Warp wrapper to run MCore refinements (MTools/M). Input is typically from a Relion tomorefine job from Warp export particles.

*REFERENCES*:
[[https://warpem.github.io/warp/reference/mtools/api/mcore/?h=mcore][MCore API]]

params.name: mcore.population
params.label: Population file:
params.help: Required. Path to the .population file containing descriptions of data sources and species. May be set by the wrapper from input context.

params.name: mcore.refine_imagewarp
params.label: Refine image warp (XxY)
params.help: Refine image warp with a grid of XxY dimensions (--refine_imagewarp). Examples: leave blank = don't refine, '1x1', '3x3', '6x4'.

params.name: mcore.refine_stageangles
params.label: Refine stage angles
params.help: Refine stage angles; tilt series only (--refine_stageangles).

params.name: extra_mcore
params.label: MCore extra arguments
params.help: Extra arguments to pass to MCore

params.name: mcore.ctf_defocus
params.label: Refine defocus
params.help: Refine defocus using a local search (--ctf_defocus).

params.name: mcore.ctf_defocusexhaustive
params.label: Exhaustive defocus (first sub-iter)
params.help: Refine defocus using a more exhaustive grid search in the first sub-iteration (--ctf_defocusexhaustive); only with ctf_defocus.

params.name: mcore.ctf_cs
params.label: Refine spherical aberration
params.help: Refine spherical aberration (Cs), also a proxy for pixel size (--ctf_cs).

params.label: Refine Zernike Polynomials
params.help: Refine Zernike polynomials of 2nd, 3rd, 4th and 5th order (--ctf_zernike2, --ctf_zernike3, --ctf_zernike4, --ctf_zernike5).

params.name: mcore.ctf_zernike2
params.label: 2nd order (slow)
params.help: Refine Zernike polynomials of 2nd order (--ctf_zernike2). Slow.

params.name: mcore.ctf_zernike3
params.label: 3rd order (beam tilt, trefoil)
params.help: Refine Zernike polynomials of 3rd order – beam tilt, trefoil (--ctf_zernike3). Fast.

params.name: mcore.ctf_zernike4
params.label: 4th order (slow)
params.help: Refine Zernike polynomials of 4th order (--ctf_zernike4). Slow.

params.name: mcore.ctf_zernike5
params.label: 5th order
params.help: Refine Zernike polynomials of 5th order (--ctf_zernike5). Fast.

params.name: gpus
params.label: GPUs
params.help: If it is a single number (N), total number of GPUs (0..N-1). If multiple values, specific GPU IDs.

params.name: mcore.perdevice_refine
params.label: Processes per device (refine)
params.help: Number of processes per GPU for refinement (--perdevice_refine). Set >1 if GPUs have enough memory. Default: 1.
